label: GDP growth (real, YoY %)
source_or_assumption: ABS 5206 National Accounts (Mar 2026, real SA, through-the-year)
macro_note: base is the live ABS through-the-year reading; mild applies a technical-recession-sized hit (growth stalls toward zero), severe a deep multi-quarter contraction.

label: Cash rate (%)
macro_note: illustrative higher-for-longer rate path; debt-servicing channel.

label: Inflation (CPI, YoY %)
source_or_assumption: ABS 6401 CPI (Mar 2026 quarter, all groups, through-the-year)
macro_note: cost-of-living pressure on borrower cash flow.

label: Wage growth (WPI, YoY %)
source_or_assumption: ABS 6345 Wage Price Index (Mar 2026 quarter, through-the-year)
macro_note: real-income squeeze when paired with higher inflation.

label: House-price growth (YoY %)
source_or_assumption: stated (ABS 6416 RPPI discontinued after Dec-2021; no current free public index)
macro_note: collateral channel for residential-secured lending; base is a stated reading pending a replacement public price index.

label: Exchange rate (TWI, % change)
macro_note: depreciation raises input costs for FX-exposed corporates.

label: Industry / sector output (YoY %)
macro_note: sector-revenue channel for SME / corporate borrowers.

label: Commercial-property prices (% change)
macro_note: ASSUMPTION — no clean free quarterly series; anchored to RBA FSR commentary.

label: Vacancy rate (office, %)
macro_note: ASSUMPTION — illustrative office-vacancy path; RBA FSR backdrop.

label: CRE rents (% change)
macro_note: ASSUMPTION — illustrative rent path; valuer/RBA commentary.

label: CRE cap rates (%)
macro_note: ASSUMPTION — cap-rate expansion lowers CRE values.
